markdownRemark.html:
Awesome MongoDB

A curated list of awesome MongoDB resources, libraries, tools and applications

Inspired by the awesomestars164.8k list thing. Feel free to improve this list by contributing!

Table of Contents

  • Resources
    • Documentation
    • Articles
    • Books
    • Talks
    • Tutorials
    • More

Resources

Documentation

  • MongoDB introduction
  • MongoDB documentation
  • MongoDB tutorials
  • MongoDB developer blog

Articles

  • 14 Things I Wish I'd Known When Starting with MongoDB (Phil Factor)
  • A Custom WordPress Dashboard with MongoDB Atlas, Microsoft Azure, & Serverless Functions (Ahmad Awais)
  • Building with Patterns - Series of articles regarding MongoDB Design Patterns and common use case of each Design Pattern with real world examples.
  • Five Things About Scaling MongoDB (A. Jesse Jiryu Davis, MongoDB Inc.) - Scale 101
  • Optimizing MongoDB Compound Indexes (A. Jesse Jiryu Davis, MongoDB Inc.) - Everything you need/have to know about indexes
  • Server Discovery And Monitoring In PyMongo, Perl, And C (A. Jesse Jiryu Davis, MongoDB Inc.)
  • Monitoring MongoDB performance metrics (Jean-Mathieu Saponaro, Datadog)

Books

  • 50 Tips and Tricks for MongoDB Developers - Advanced MongoDB tips and tricks, given by a MongoDB inc. engineer
  • Builder Book - Learn how to build a full stack JavaScript web app from scratch
  • MongoDB Applied Design Patterns (Rick Copeland)
  • The Little MongoDB Book - Basic introduction
  • SaaS Boilerplate Book - Learn how to build a production-ready SaaS web app from scratch

Talks

  • MongoDB Schema Design (Tugdual Grall, MongoDB Inc.) [47']
  • Partial and Fuzzy Matching with MongoDB (John Page, MongoDB Inc.) [35']
  • Scaling MongoDB on Amazon Web Services (Michael Saffitz, Apptentive) [50']

Tutorials

  • Kubernetes examples - Deployment tutorial of a basic Node.js and MongoDB web stack on Kubernetes
  • Deploy a Highly-Available MongoDB Replica Set on AWS

More

  • MongoDB source codestars19.7k
  • MongoDB University - Certifications and free online courses
  • MongoDB 101 by Academy 3T - Free and self-paced MongoDB courses for beginners

Libraries

C

  • mongo-c-driverstars656 - Official C driver

C++

  • mongo-cxx-driverstars808 - Official C++ driver

C#/.NET

  • mongo-csharp-driverstars2.6k - Official C# driver
  • mongo-queue-csharpstars2 - C# message queue on top of MongoDB
  • MongoDB Messagingstars53 - Lightweight queue pub/sub processing library
  • MongoRepositorystars292 - Repository abstraction layer on top of the C# driver

Delphi

  • TMongoWirestars89 - Minimal community Delphi driver

Elixir

  • mongodbstars469 - Community Elixir driver
  • mongodb_ectostars321 - Adapter for the Ecto database wrapper

Erlang

  • mongodb-erlangstars310 - Community Erlang driver

Go

  • Bongostars452 - ODM based on mgo
  • mgostars1.9k - Community Go driver
  • minquerystars58 - MongoDB cursor that paginates
  • mongo-go-driverstars5.7k - Official Go driver

Haskell

  • mongodbstars132 - Community Haskell driver

Java

  • Jongostars568 - Query in Java as in Mongo shell
  • Hibernate OGMstars302 - The power and simplicity of JPA for NoSQL datastores
  • mongo-java-driverstars2.4k - Official Java driver
  • mongo-queue-javastars35 - Java message queue on top of MongoDB
  • mongoFSstars20 - An enhancement of GridFS to allow for more features and capabilities
  • Mongojackstars247 - Based on Jackson, allows you to easily handle your mongo objects as POJOs
  • Morphiastars1.5k - Java ODM
  • Morphiumstars51 - Java ODM and caching layer
  • Mungbeanstars20 - Community driver for languages running on the JVM
  • Spring Data MongoDBstars1.3k - Spring based, object-document support and repositories

JavaScript

  • Camostars540 - Class-based ES6 ODM for Mongo-like databases
  • DeriveJSstars48 - Reactive ODM that uses Javascript Proxies to enable transparent DB persistence
  • MEAN.JSstars4.9k - Full stack based on MongoDB, Express, AngularJS, and Node.js
  • MERN (mern-starter)stars5.2k - Full stack based on MongoDB, Express, React and Node.js
  • Meteorstars42.4k - Real-time/reactive client-server framework based on MongoDB, with lots of features
  • Mongoosestars22.6k - Node.js asynchronous ODM
  • CASL Mongoose - Permissions management library integrated with Mongoose
  • mongrationstars78 - Node.js migration framework
  • Moonridgestars65 - Framework with live querying on top of Mongoose and socket.io
  • node-mongodb-nativestars9k - Official Node.js driver

Julia

  • Mongo.jlstars27 - C driver bindings

Lisp

  • cl-mongostars125 - Community Common Lisp interface
  • mongo-cl-driverstars35 Community Common Lisp driver
  • mongo-elstars45 - Community Emacs Lisp driver

Mathematica

  • MongoDBLinkstars18 - Community Mathematica driver

Perl

  • mongo-perl-driverstars203 - Official Perl driver

PHP

  • Doctrine MongoDBstars442 - Wrapper around the native PHP Mongo PECL extension to provide additional functionality
  • eloquent-mongodb-repositorystars14 - Repository implementation built on top of laravel-mongodb
  • laravel-mongodbstars5.5k - Eloquent model and query builder for Laravel
  • mongodb-repositorystars8 - Repository implementation
  • PHPMongo ODMstars230 - ODM based on the PHP Mongo PECL extension
  • PHPMongo Migratorstars28 - Migration tool based on PHPMongo ODM
  • pecl/mongodbstars744 - Official PHP driver
  • yadmstars87 - Fast schemaless ODM

Python

  • Beaniestars116 - Asynchronous ODM based on Motor and Pydantic, which supports migrations out of the box
  • Djongostars1.3k - MongoDB connector for Django compatible with Django ORM
  • Flask-Stupestars30 - Flask extension that adds PyMongo support to Flask
  • Mongo-Thingystars50 - Idiomatic and friendly-yet-powerful ODM (schemaless)
  • MongoEnginestars3.5k - ODM on top of PyMongo
  • MongoLogstars128 - MongoDB logging handler
  • Motorstars1.7k - Non-blocking Python driver for Tornado or asyncio
  • PyMongostars3.3k - Official (and recommended) Python driver
  • minimongostars321 - A lightweight, schemaless, Pythonic Object-Oriented interface
  • scrapy-mongodbstars337 - MongoDB pipeline for Scrapy
  • μMongostars336 - Driver-independent (async/sync) ODM based on marshmallow

R

  • mongolitestars261 - Fast and simple client for R

Ruby

  • awesome_explainstars7 - A simple global method to explain Mongoid queries
  • mongo-ruby-driverstars1.4k - Official Ruby driver
  • Mongoidstars3.8k - ODM framework

Rust

  • mongodb-rust-driverstars685 - Official Rust driver

Scala

  • mongo-scala-driverstars286 - Official Scala driver
  • ReactiveMongostars823 - Non-blocking Scala driver
  • Spark-MongoDBstars307 - Read/write data with Spark SQL

Tools

Administration

  • mongoctlstars175 - Manage MongoDB servers and replica sets using JSON configurations
  • MongoDB Smasherstars30 - Generate randomized datasets and benchmark your setup
  • mongodb-toolsstars288 - Three neat Python scripts to work with collections and indexes
  • mtoolsstars1.6k - Collection of scripts to set up test environments and visualize log files
  • nginx-gridfsstars798 - Nginx module for serving files from GridFS
  • nginx-mongodb-reststars30 - REST client written as an Nginx module
  • pt-mongodb-query-digest - Aggregates queries from query profiler and reports query usage statistics
  • pt-mongodb-summary - MongoDB cluster status overview command line tool

Services:

  • Compose - IBM DBaaS offer (has other database types too)
  • MongoDB Atlas - MongoDB Inc. DBaaS offer (works with AWS, Azure, or GCP)
  • MongoDB Cloud Manager - MongoDB Inc. databases management offer
  • ObjectRocket - Rackspace DBaaS offer (has other database types too)
  • Scalegrid - Fully managed DBaaS (with option to bring your own Azure/AWS account)

Data

  • mongo-connectorstars1.8k - Streaming replication to Elasticsearch, Solr, or MongoDB
  • mongo_fdwstars225 - PostgreSQL foreign data wrapper
  • mongo-hadoopstars1.5k - Hadoop connector
  • Mongolasticstars131 - MongoDB to Elasticsearch (and vice-versa) migration tool
  • MongoMultiMasterstars65 - Multi-master replication

Deployment

  • ansible-role-mongodbstars294 - Ansible role
  • chef-mongodbstars369 - Chef cookbook
  • Dockerfilestars298
  • Helm Chart
  • puppet-mongodbstars90 - Puppet module (formerly puppetlabs-mongodb)

Desktop

  • Compass - Free Cross-platform GUI from MongoDB
  • DataGrip - Cross-platform JetBrains' IDE
  • dbKoda - Cross-platform and open-source IDE
  • MongoDB for VS Code - Connect to MongoDB and prototype queries from VS Code
  • MongoHubstars2.5k - Mac native client
  • Mongotron - Cross-platform and open-source client built with Electron
  • NoSQLBooster - Feature-rich but easy-to-use cross-platform IDE (formerly MongoBooster)
  • Nosqlclientstars3.3k - Cross-platform, self hosted and easy to use management tool (formerly Mongoclient)
  • QueryAssist - Modern and powerful GUI tool, cross-platform and easy-to-use
  • Robo 3Tstars8.6k - Free, native and cross-platform shell-centric GUI (formerly Robomongo)
  • Studio 3T - Cross-platform GUI, stable and powerful (formerly MongoChef)
  • TablePlus - Native, lightweight GUI on macOS

Development

  • mgodatagenstars219 - Random data generator
  • Mongo Playground - Online query playground
  • Mongo Seedingstars395 - Node.js library, CLI and Docker image for populating databases using JS and JSON files
  • Mongoeyestars118 - Schema and data analyzer: explore data in your collections
  • Varietystars1.5k - Schema analyzer: see what fields are in your collection and what's their content

Services:

  • MongoDB Realm - MongoDB Inc. development services and SDK

Monitoring

  • check_mongodbstars15 - Nagios plugin (in Bash)
  • mongo-monitorstars69 - Simple monitoring CLI
  • mongo-muninstars149 - Collection of Munin plugins
  • Mongoopstars37 - Long operations monitoring and alerting
  • mongomonstars24 - More Munin plugins
  • Motopstars65 - MongoDB top clone
  • mtopstars49 - Another top clone
  • nagios-plugin-mongodbstars345 - Nagios plugin (in Python)
  • Percona Monitoring and Management - Free and open-source platform for managing and monitoring databases performances
  • mongotailstars170 - Log all MongoDB queries in a "tail"able way

Services:

  • Datadog - SaaS-based monitoring
  • Solarwindws Database Performance Monitor - SaaS-based query performance analytics and monitoring

Shell

  • mongo-hackerstars1.8k - MongoDB shell enhancements

Web

  • adminMongostars3.7k - Web-based user interface to handle connections and databases needs
  • mongo-expressstars4.1k - Web-based admin interface built with Express
  • mongoadminstars250 - Admin interface built with Django
  • Mongokustars1k - MongoDB client for the web
  • mongristars72 - Web-based user interface written in JavaScript
  • Rockmongostars1k - PHPMyAdmin for MongoDB, sort of

Services:

  • HumongouS.io - Easy online GUI and data-visualization dashboards

Applications

Those open-source applications have MongoDB somewhere in their stack:

  • Builder Book Appstars2.7k - Web app to publish books or documentation built with React and Express
  • CodeCombatstars7.4k - Multiplayer programming game for learning how to code
  • Countlystars4.7k - Mobile & web analytics and marketing platform built with Node.js
  • FactorJSstars1.2k - JavaScript CMS built with Mongoose
  • GrandNodestars1.7k - Multi-platform e-commerce shopping cart built with ASP.NET
  • Leanotestars10k - Evernote clone built with Go
  • NodeBBstars11.9k - Node.js based forum software ("built for the modern web")
  • Reactionstars11.3k - Event-driven, real-time commerce platform built with ES6
  • SaaS Boilerplatestars2.4k - Boilerplate for SaaS products, built with TypeScript, React and Express
  • uptimestars3.6k - Remote monitoring application built with Node.js and Bootstrap
  • WildDuck Mail Server - Scalable high availability email server that uses MongoDB for email storage

License

To the extent possible under law, Guillaume Gelin has waived all copyright and related or neighboring rights to this work.
